action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 10 training destroyed the model (F1=0.005 vs 0.3843 baseline). The good checkpoint was overwritten. With ~1 hour left, I need to quickly retrain 2-3 epochs with the simple approach (CE loss, no class-balanced sampling) that worked before. Each epoch on single GPU was ~16 min, so 3 epochs = 48 min. With DataParallel properly working, maybe faster. Decision: Quick retrain with simple CE loss, submit eval.

command_output.stderr: [TIMEOUT] Command exceeded 3730s limit. Consider reducing epochs or using a smaller model.
